steps.t: You should return to Radagast, located at the highest point of Thornholt.
All the items can be found in and around the Thornholt woods. You should collect the ingredients Radagast requires for the potion of protection agains…
You should return to Radagast in Thornholt with all the ingredients you have collected.
You should place all the ingredients in the nearby mortar and pestle for Radagast, in Thornholt woods.
Radagast can be found in the Thornholt woods. You should return to Radagast with the mixed concoction.
You should return to Vaskorn in Skoghús, in the Thornholt woods, and tell him of Radagast's potion.
You should go to Threkmóth in Skoghús, in the Thornholt woods, and find out where Vaskorn is.
